note: Capsule text body now renders in gold (#facc15) with a soft glow — text-shadow + inset/outer box-shadow on a near-black gradient backdrop. The chip above the body still carries the per-type colour (green Open Note, cyan Structured, magenta Cert, yellow Doc Ref); the body itself is now treated as a single 'engraved' artefact regardless of type, so it reads as THE message of the TX. Same change in the mempool detail path. NO consensus, NO RPC, NO transaction format. Auto-reloads every open explorer tab within 60 s.
